ns0:entry.ns0:title: benjamimgois/goverlay
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/benjamimgois/goverlay
Language: pascal
Goverlay is an easy graphical interface to configure linux gaming applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cheat-engine/cheat-engine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cheat-engine/cheat-engine
Language: pascal
Cheat Engine. A development environment focused on modding

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danieleteti/delphimvcframework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danieleteti/delphimvcframework
Language: pascal
DMVCFramework (for short) is a popular and powerful framework for Web API and Web Applications in Delphi. Supports RESTful and JSON-RPC WEB APIs development.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jrsoftware/issrc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jrsoftware/issrc
Language: pascal
Inno Setup is an open-source installation builder for Windows applications by Jordan Russell and Martijn Laan. Since its introduction in 1997, Inno Setup has been trusted by developers and organizations of all sizes to reliably deploy software to millions of PCs worldwide.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lmbelo/pyscripter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lmbelo/pyscripter
Language: pascal
Pyscripter is a feature-rich but lightweight Python IDE

ns0:entry.ns0:title: peazip/PeaZip
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/peazip/PeaZip
Language: pascal
Free Zip / Unzip software and Rar file extractor. Cross-platform file and archive manager. Features volume spanning, compression, authenticated encryption. Supports 7Z, 7-Zip sfx, ACE, ARJ, Brotli, BZ2, CAB, CHM, CPIO, DEB, GZ, ISO, JAR, LHA/LZH, NSIS, OOo, PAQ/LPAQ, PEA, QUAD, RAR, RPM, split, TAR, Z, ZIP, ZIPX, Zstandard.
